name: Chocolate Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients, except powdered sugar, until well blended.
2. Pour the batter into a greased bundt pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 50-60 minutes.
4. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes.
5. Turn the cake out onto a serving plate.
6. Sprinkle with powdered sugar once thoroughly cooled.
